settings.title: What Size Cans/Bottles Does Beer Buddy fit?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/NNatC86Uv9A?si=xAgtFh_1Zuh_I49o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: Beer Buddy fits any standard size 12oz can/skinny can/bottle/stubby bottle.

settings.title: What Comes With The Purchase Of The Beer Buddy?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="315" height="560" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/CUd_8W9yK30?feature=share" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: The Beer Buddy comes with a leakproof tumbler lid for your liquids and a beverage insulator lid for your cans/bottles.

settings.title: How Should I Clean The Beer Buddy?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="315" height="560" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/pqY9YP0N5ZU?feature=share" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: We recommend not to place the Beer Buddy into the dishwasher to ensure the life of the silicone gasket rings. Hand wash only.

settings.title: How Many Ounces Of Liquid Can It Hold With The Tumbler Lid?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="315" height="560" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/H8QYFsRSbxM?feature=share" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: The Beer Buddy can hold up to 16oz of hot/cold liquid and keep them at that temperature for a long time!

settings.title: How Long Does It Keep The Drink Cold/Hot?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="315" height="560" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/-Soymt4zQXU?feature=share" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: Beer Buddy has double insulated walls to help keep your drinks cold or hot! 12+ hours!
